{{Infobox character
| name = King (The Last Horizon)
| appears_in = The Last Horizon
| introduced = [[The Captain (novel)|The Captain]]
}}

== The Captain ==
<div class="wv-facts"><div class="wv-facts-head">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">3</span></div><div class="mw-collapsible mw-collapsed wv-facts-body">
<ul class="wv-fact-list">
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The King is an unborn, inactive [[Iron King]].<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c3">''The Captain'', chapter 3</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The King is taller than any human man.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45">''The Captain'', chapter 45</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The King's body contains panels that reveal guns.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c45" />}}</li>
</ul>
</div></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon characters]]
